positive: Minimalist celestial fox spirit, sitting gracefully amongst bioluminescent mountain flora and stylized constellations. The fox should have clean, flowing lines and a gentle, ethereal glow. Style: Art Nouveau meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, rendered with sharp vector-like quality. Color palette: Deep indigo, midnight blue, accented by glowing teal, magenta, and gold accents. Composition: Centralized, symmetrical, with negative space emphasized around the figure. Lighting: Soft, dramatic rim lighting highlighting the fox's silhouette against a dark, cosmic background. Print-friendly details: Perfect for DTG printing, crisp lines, single-color separation potential, high contrast silhouette.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, grainy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, poor composition, cluttered, realistic photo, photorealism, human, typography
